jobs.transcript: I like Tabasco sauce. I like Louisiana Hot Sauce, Frank's Red Hot Sauce, Seven Guys Sauce, Dave's Insanity Sauce. These are from my garden. Now these are Cayenne peppers. They're togashi peppers.
